user.title: SpotScheduler
user.description:
Configure SpotScheduler to schedule devices based on Nord Pool electricity spot prices.

Requires the built-in Nord Pool integration (Home Assistant 2024.12+).

data_description.nordpool_config_entry: Select your configured Nord Pool integration instance.
data_description.expensive_hours_count: This many most expensive hours per day will be highlighted in the schedule view.

devices.title: Select devices
devices.description: Choose the devices you want to schedule. Supported: switches, lights, thermostats, input booleans.

error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.

abort.nordpool_not_found: Nord Pool integration not found. Please set it up first under Settings → Devices & Services.

data_description.devices: Choose which devices can be scheduled on/off by hour.
data_description.expensive_hours_count: This many most expensive hours per day will be outlined in red.
data_description.nordpool_config_entry: Select which Nord Pool instance provides the price data.
data_description.price_threshold_low: Prices below this are shown in green. In cents per kWh.
data_description.price_threshold_high: Prices above this are shown in red. In cents per kWh.

nordpool_integration_missing.title: Nord Pool integration removed
nordpool_integration_missing.description: The Nord Pool integration that SpotScheduler depends on can no longer be found. Please re-add Nord Pool under Settings → Devices & Services, then reload SpotScheduler.

nordpool_unavailable.title: Nord Pool prices unavailable
nordpool_unavailable.description:
SpotScheduler could not fetch today's electricity prices. The Nord Pool API may be temporarily unavailable. Prices will be retried automatically.

You can also trigger a manual refresh via **Services → spot_scheduler.refresh_prices**.
